scripts.dev: infisical run --env=${INFISICAL_ENV:-dev} -- uv run python src/agent.py dev --no-reload
scripts.start: infisical run --env=${INFISICAL_ENV:-dev} -- uv run python src/agent.py start
scripts.test: uv run python -m unittest discover -s tests
scripts.doctor: infisical run --env=${INFISICAL_ENV:-dev} -- uv run python src/agent.py doctor
scripts.dev:lk: infisical run --env=${INFISICAL_ENV:-dev} -- lk agent dev src/agent.py
